Two required courses:

AOSC400

Physical Meteorology

3

AOSC401

Climate Dynamics and Earth System Science

3

One additional elective from any 400 level courses offered in the Department of Atmospheric and Oceanic Science on a regular basis, or from a list of non-permanent electives that will be offered by research scientists, regular faculty from Atmospheric and Oceanic Science, or members of the Earth System Science Interdisciplinary Center (ESSIC)

3
